nasb.text: The king made silver as common as stones in Jerusalem, and he made cedars as plentiful as sycamore trees that are in the lowland.

esv.text: And the king made silver as common in Jerusalem as stone, and he made cedar as plentiful as the sycamore of the Shephelah.

cnv.text: 王在耶路撒冷使銀子好像石頭一樣，使香柏木好像平原的桑樹那麼多。

ccb.text: 王使耶路撒冷的金银多如石头，使香柏木多如丘陵的无花果树。
